hero.description: I partner with growing businesses to replace outdated websites with premium digital experiences that build instant credibility and turn visitors into customers.
hero.credibility: Trusted by startups, clinics & growing businesses

meet.bio: my name is ermili, website specialist and developer. I create high-end websites for businesses that want to look credible and grow online.
meet.experience: With experience across design and development, I combine technical expertise with a strong design sensibility to build digital experiences that truly stand out.
meet.cta: Let's make your website something extraordinary!

projects.title: Websites crafted for brands that want to stand out.

process.title: How I bring your project to life
process.subtitle: A clear, collaborative workflow — from first conversation to final launch.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: I dig into your business, audience, and goals. We align on what success looks like before a single pixel is placed.

strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.description: Content structure, user flows, and positioning — mapped out so every design decision serves a clear purpose.

design.title: Design
design.description: High-fidelity visuals that capture your brand's personality. Refined until every detail feels intentional.

development.title: Development
development.description: Clean, performant code. Built responsive from the start with smooth interactions and fast load times.

launch.title: Launch
launch.description: Final QA, deployment, and handoff. Your site goes live polished and production-ready.

faq.title: Answers to your questions
faq.subtitle: Clear and helpful answers to all your inquiries.

whatKind.question: What kind of websites do you build?
whatKind.answer: I design and develop modern websites for businesses that want to build trust, attract more customers, and grow online. Whether you need a company website, landing page, or custom web application, every project is tailored to your business.

howLong.question: How long does a project usually take?
howLong.answer: The timeline depends on the project's complexity. Most business websites are completed within 2–6 weeks, while larger custom solutions may take longer. You'll receive a clear timeline before development begins.

seo.question: Will my website be optimized for SEO?
seo.answer: Yes. Every website is built with SEO best practices, fast loading speeds, responsive design, and clean code to help improve your visibility on search engines and deliver a better user experience.

update.question: Can I update the website myself?
update.answer: Absolutely. If your website includes a content management system (CMS), you'll be able to edit text, images, blog posts, and other content without needing any technical skills.

afterLaunch.question: What happens after my website goes live?
afterLaunch.answer: Launching your website is just the beginning. You'll receive everything you need to manage it confidently, and if you prefer ongoing support, I offer maintenance, updates, performance improvements, and technical assistance whenever you need it.

contact.title: Ready to move forward?
contact.subtitle: If you're exploring a new website or want expert guidance, I'm here to help you make the right decision.
